title: OE's Rocks
body:
# OE's ROCKS
Use Rocks to defend you self in early game! use a verity of rocks such as Deepslate Rocks, Molten Rocks, and Frosted Rocks. You can also use a slingshot to shoot rocks more effectively.
This mod is still in alpha. 
![Rocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YOvF55XJ/images/86329cf94f3969313b4cff92bee2e6008d331666.png)

Items you can obtain 
Rock,
Deepslate rock,
Molten Rock,
and Frosted rock.

## Rock

Rocks hit hard but deal more damage when used with slingshot.

Hit cobblestone with hammers to obtain rocks or find settlements and get more rocks.


## Deepslate Rock

Deals more damage than a normal rock.

Hit Cobbled Deepslate with hammers to obtain deepslate rocks or find Aged settlements and get more deepslate rocks.

## Molten Rock
Sets your enemy's ablaze.

Haves a chance to drop from aged settlement.

## Frosted Rock
Freezes your enemy's.
Obtained by mining Frosted settlements which are found in under cold biomes.


# How to Craft Items
